post.description: Upload a digital asset with quota enforcement for storage and file size limits

productId.description: ID of the product associated with this asset

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary asset for the product

isPreview.description: Whether this asset is a preview only

201.description: The digital asset has been successfully uploaded.

400.description: No file uploaded, file too large (10MB for images / 500MB otherwise), invalid file size, or the asset's environment does not match the target product's environment.

message.example: No file uploaded, file too large (10MB for images / 500MB otherwise), invalid file size, or the asset's environment does not match the target product's environment.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token / API key

message.example: Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token / API key

403.description: You do not have access to upload assets for this product, this API key does not have permission to perform this action, or it is not associated with an active organization.

message.example: You do not have access to upload assets for this product, this API key does not have permission to perform this action, or it is not associated with an active organization.

message.example: Rate limit exceeded for this API key

get.description: Retrieve listings owned by the authenticated user. Pass organizationId to narrow results to a specific organization when the user belongs to multiple. Pass storeId to narrow further to a single store.

parameters.name: productType
parameters.description: Product type filter — only applies when listings resolve to a Product entity. Use this to narrow results to physical, digital, or hybrid products.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Listing status filter. Defaults to PUBLISHED when omitted. Pass "all" to include archived/suspended listings (useful for owner dashboards).

parameters.name: stockStatus
parameters.description: Stock availability filter — only applies to Product listings. "in_stock" returns products with stock > 0 or unlimited (stockQuantity null); "out_of_stock" returns products with stockQuantity 0. Omit for all.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token / API key

message.example: Unauthorized — invalid or missing JWT token / API key

403.description: You do not have access to the specified organization, this API key does not have permission to perform this action, or it is not associated with an active organization.

message.example: Rate limit exceeded for this API key

post.description: Checks if a store slug is available for use. Performs comprehensive validation including: (1) Profanity and offensive content filtering, (2) Reserved system words check, (3) Format and quality validation, (4) Database existence check. post.summary: Vendor: Retry settlement for delivered suborder
post.description: Allows vendors to retry settlement if it failed during delivery confirmation. This endpoint is idempotent and can be called multiple times safely. Settlement can only be retried for suborders in DELIVERED status. If settlement is already completed, returns success immediately.

200.description: Settlement retry initiated or already completed

400.description: SubOrder not in DELIVERED status

get.description: Returns a paginated, filterable list of suborders for the vendor dashboard. Supports filtering by status (single or comma-separated list), fulfillment type, date range, total amount range, specific store, customer, tracking presence, and free-text search across suborder number, tracking ID, and notes. Results can be sorted by date, total, subtotal, or status. Use currencyCode to convert all monetary amounts to a target currency (original order amounts are always preserved alongside converted values).

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of statuses to filter by. Overrides single status param if both provided. Example: "pending,confirmed,processing"

parameters.name: storeId
parameters.description: Filter by specific store ID (for vendors with multiple stores)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for date range filter (ISO 8601, inclusive)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for date range filter (ISO 8601, inclusive)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search query — matches against suborder number, tracking ID, vendor notes, or customer notes

parameters.name: hasTracking
parameters.description: Filter suborders that have tracking info

parameters.name: currencyCode
parameters.description: Convert all monetary amounts in the response to this currency code. Original (order) amounts are always included alongside converted values. Example: "NGN", "USD", "GBP"

info.title: Partner API Reference
info.description: Endpoints reachable by external partners authenticated with a merchant API key (`X-Api-Key: sk_<env>_<secret>`). This is a strict subset of the full API — only routes explicitly opened up for partner integrations appear here.

X-Api-Key.name: X-Api-Key
X-Api-Key.description: Merchant API key, e.g. sk_live_xxxxx or sk_sandbox_xxxxx

next.description: Next page number (null if no next page)

prev.description: Previous page number (null if no previous page)

results.description: Array of items for current page

path.description: The request path that produced this error — always the actual path called, not a fixed value

message.example: You do not have access to the specified organization.
Operation completed successfully

error.description: Error information (only present when status is error)

errorCode.description: Machine-readable error code (only present when status is error)

exifStripped.description: Whether EXIF metadata was stripped from the uploaded file (true only for image uploads)

processedSize.description: File size in bytes after processing (EXIF-stripping for images)

originalSize.description: Original uploaded file size in bytes, before any processing

width.description: Image/video width in pixels (image and video uploads only)

height.description: Image/video height in pixels (image and video uploads only)

duration.description: Duration in seconds (video and audio uploads only)

error.description: Present instead of the above fields if metadata extraction threw — always the literal "Failed to extract metadata"

hash.description: MD5 (or, for the default/"other" asset type, the same) hash of the uploaded file content

message.example: Upload within quota limits

fileSize.description: Processed file size, formatted as a whole-megabyte string

id.description: The created DigitalAsset record's ID. Always present in practice (set right before the response is returned), typed optional only because it's assigned after object construction.

fileName.description: Generated storage file name (hash-based, extension preserved)

storageUrl.description: Public/private S3 URL the asset was uploaded to

thumbnailUrl.description: Generated thumbnail URL (only for image/video/document asset types; empty string otherwise)

quotaInfo.description: Not set by the service — attached by DigitalAssetController#uploadAsset on top of the service result before the response is sent.

videoAssetId.description: Linked ListingVideoAsset id (video). Set to link + track it.

value.description: Option value identifier used by cart customizations

priceAdjustment.description: Optional unit price adjustment when this option is selected

isDefault.description: Whether this option is selected by default

isAvailable.description: Whether this option is currently available

key.description: Stable customization key used in cart customizations payload

label.description: Display label for this customization group

inputType.description: Input type expected for this group

allowCustomValue.description: Allow buyer-defined values outside listed options

storeId.description: Store ID (optional - will auto-create if not provided)

organizationId.description: Organization ID — when provided, the store must belong to this organization

status.description: Listing status (defaults to PUBLISHED). Use DraftListing API for drafts.

isQuickCreate.description: AI quick-create flag (set internally by the quick-create flow; ignored when supplied by clients).

marketplaceOptIn.description: Opt in to the public marketplace. When true, listing enters admin review before appearing in the global marketplace feed. Storefront visibility is unaffected.

productType.description: Denormalized product type (physical/digital/hybrid) — only set when entityType is product

createdVia.description: Which auth channel created this listing

marketplaceOptIn.description: Whether this listing opted in to the public marketplace

storeId.description: Store ID (not populated on this endpoint)

ownerId.description: Owner user ID (not populated on this endpoint)

organizationId.description: Organization ID, if the store is org-owned

currencyId.description: Currency ID (not populated on this endpoint)

productType.description: Denormalized product type (physical/digital/hybrid) — only set when entityType is product

createdVia.description: Which auth channel created this listing

marketplaceOptIn.description: Whether this listing opted in to the public marketplace

organizationId.description: Organization ID, if the store is org-owned

convertedBasePrice.description: Base price converted to the requesting user preferred currency, when applicable.

productType.description: Denormalized product type (physical/digital/hybrid) — only set when entityType is product

createdVia.description: Which auth channel created this listing

marketplaceOptIn.description: Whether this listing opted in to the public marketplace

organizationId.description: Organization ID, if the store is org-owned

convertedBasePrice.description: Base price converted to the requesting user preferred currency when applicable; otherwise equals basePrice.

convertedMaxPrice.description: Max price converted to the requesting user preferred currency when applicable; otherwise equals maxPrice.

convertedOriginalPrice.description: Original price converted to the requesting user preferred currency when applicable; otherwise equals originalPrice.

originalBasePrice.description: Original base price in listing currency before conversion.

originalMaxPrice.description: Original max price in listing currency before conversion.

originalOriginalPrice.description: Original (pre-discount) price in listing currency before conversion.

displayCurrency.description: Display currency used for converted* fields.

originalCurrency.description: Source listing currency for original* fields.

storeId.description: Store ID (optional - will auto-create if not provided)

organizationId.description: Organization ID — when provided, the store must belong to this organization

status.description: Listing status (defaults to PUBLISHED). Use DraftListing API for drafts.

isQuickCreate.description: AI quick-create flag (set internally by the quick-create flow; ignored when supplied by clients).

marketplaceOptIn.description: Opt in to the public marketplace. When true, listing enters admin review before appearing in the global marketplace feed. Storefront visibility is unaffected.

productType.description: Denormalized product type (physical/digital/hybrid) — only set when entityType is product

createdVia.description: Which auth channel created this listing

marketplaceOptIn.description: Whether this listing opted in to the public marketplace

organizationId.description: Organization ID, if the store is org-owned

whatsapp.description: WhatsApp number (can be same as phone)

website.description: Store website URL (optional, can be added later)

description.description: Short store description (not more than 500 characters)
description.example: We believe presentation makes every moment special, which is why we provide clean, neat, and well packaged notes...

slug.description: Custom store handle/slug (only available for paid users, auto-generated for free users)

contactInfo.description: Store contact information (phone, WhatsApp, Telegram, email)

logoUrl.description: Store logo URL (uploaded via separate upload endpoint)

bannerUrl.description: Store banner/cover URL (uploaded via separate upload endpoint)

isActive.description: Whether the store is currently active

createdVia.description: Which auth channel created this store

reservedBaseSlug.description: Un-suffixed base name reserved for this org across environments

userId.description: Store owner user ID (not populated on this endpoint)

deactivationReason.description: Reason the store was deactivated, if applicable

updatedAt.description: When the store was last updated

message.example: Store created successfully

slug.description: Store slug/handle to check for availability

available.description: Whether the slug is available for use

reason.description: Reason why slug is unavailable (if applicable)
reason.example: This slug is already taken by another store

severity.description: Severity level of the issue (if unavailable): low, medium, or high

message.description: Success message when slug is available
message.example: This slug is available and can be used for your store. Note: Custom slugs are only available for paid subscriptions.

existingStoreId.description: ID of existing store if slug is taken

message.example: Slug availability checked
Stores retrieved successfully

createdVia.description: Which auth channel created this store

reservedBaseSlug.description: Un-suffixed base name reserved for this org across environments

deactivationReason.description: Reason the store was deactivated, if applicable

updatedAt.description: When the store was last updated

message.example: Store retrieved successfully

whatsapp.description: WhatsApp number (can be same as phone)

slug.description: Custom store handle/slug (only for paid users, requires active subscription)

description.example: High-quality wireless headphones with active noise cancellation

baseUnitPrice.description: Base unit price before customization adjustments

customizationPriceAdjustment.description: Total customization adjustment applied per unit

customizations.description: Selected customization values keyed by listing customization key. This is the fulfillment snapshot for this line item.

customizationGroups.description: Customization definition snapshot captured for this order item so buyer and merchant can render options consistently after listing edits.

digitalAssets.description: For digital and hybrid products, the deliverable asset snapshots captured at checkout. Buyers obtain signed download URLs via the dedicated digital-asset download endpoint after entitlement checks.

description.example: Your order has been confirmed by the vendor

status.description: New status for the order (excluding cancelled). Use dedicated buyer/vendor cancel endpoints for cancellation.

notes.description: Additional notes about the status change
notes.example: Order is being prepared for shipment

orderItems.description: Resolved order items (normalized OrderItem collection, falling back to embedded items)

displayCurrency.description: Only present when a target currencyCode query param was supplied and resolved

deliveryDetails.description: Delivery details (address, coordinates, instructions) — see SubOrder.schema.ts DeliveryDetails

referral.description: Points for referring a new customer

custom.description: Custom actions defined by merchant, keyed by action name

environment.description: Key environment this config belongs to

storeId.description: Store this loyalty programme is scoped to

isActive.description: Whether the loyalty program is active (tied to subscription plan status)

isVerxioEnabled.description: Whether the merchant is using Verxio Protocol on-chain integration

verxioCreatedAt.description: When the Verxio program was created

verxioLastSyncedAt.description: When the Verxio program was last synced

tierRefs.description: References to LoyaltyTier records for this config. DEPRECATED — use the tiers endpoint instead of this field.

purchaseThreshold.description: Currency amount that triggers point calculation

pointsToMoneyRatio.description: How many points equal 1 unit of currency discount

allowPointTransfers.description: Whether customers can transfer points to others

suspendedAt.description: When the loyalty program was suspended

reactivatedAt.description: When the loyalty program was reactivated

suspensionCount.description: How many times the program has been suspended

referral.description: Points for referring a new customer

purchaseThreshold.description: Currency amount that triggers point calculation (e.g. 1000 = every ₦1000 earns points)

allowPointTransfers.description: Whether customers can transfer points to others

isActive.description: Whether the loyalty program is active

environment.description: Key environment this tier belongs to

merchantId.description: Merchant who owns this tier (null for global templates)

loyaltyConfigId.description: Loyalty config this tier belongs to

xpRequired.description: Points required to reach this tier

xpRequiredNext.description: Points required for the next tier (for progress bars)

benefits.description: List of benefits for this tier

rewards.description: List of rewards for this tier

birthdayBonus.description: Extra birthday points for this tier

color.description: Hex color code for tier badge

isTemplate.description: True for global templates, false for merchant-specific

templateName.description: Name of the template this tier was copied from

copiedFromTemplateId.description: Template tier this was copied from, if any

totalCustomersInTier.description: How many customers are currently in this tier

totalCustomersEverReached.description: Lifetime count of customers who ever reached this tier

lastCustomerJoinedAt.description: When the last customer joined this tier

xpRequired.description: Points required to reach this tier

benefits.description: List of benefits for this tier

rewards.description: List of rewards for this tier

color.description: Hex color code for tier badge

xpRequired.description: Points required to reach this tier

customerId.description: Customer the points were awarded to

newBalance.description: Customer's new active point balance for this merchant/store after the award

totalActivePoints.description: Customer's total active points across the underlying LoyaltyPoint record

customerId.description: Customer ID to award points to

points.description: Number of points to award (must be a whole number)

customerId.description: Customer the points were deducted from

newBalance.description: Customer's new active point balance for this merchant/store after the deduction

customerId.description: Customer ID to deduct points from

points.description: Number of points to deduct (must be a whole number)

environment.description: Key environment this reward belongs to

storeId.description: Store this reward belongs to (absent for a merchant-wide/org-wide reward)

pointsCost.description: How many loyalty points this reward costs to redeem

discountAmount.description: Discount amount in merchant currency (for discount_fixed type)

availableFrom.description: Date from which the reward becomes available

availableUntil.description: Date until which the reward is available

redeemedCount.description: How many times this reward has been redeemed

minimumTier.description: Minimum tier required to redeem this reward

storeId.description: Store ID this reward belongs to. If omitted, resolved from active store selection. Null = org-wide reward.

description.example: Get 10% off your next order when you redeem this reward

pointsCost.description: How many loyalty points this reward costs to redeem

discountAmount.description: Discount amount in merchant currency (for discount_fixed type, max 2 decimal places)

availableFrom.description: Date from which the reward becomes available

availableUntil.description: Date until which the reward is available

minimumTier.description: Minimum tier required to redeem this reward

storeId.description: Store ID this reward belongs to. Null = org-wide reward.

environment.description: Key environment this redemption belongs to

rewardId.description: Reward catalog entry this was redeemed from (absent for ad-hoc/custom redemptions)

rewardName.description: Snapshot of the reward name at time of redemption

rewardDescription.description: Snapshot of the reward description at time of redemption

monetaryValue.description: Calculated value in merchant currency (pointsSpent / pointsToMoneyRatio)

fulfilledBy.description: Staff user who fulfilled the redemption

redeemedVia.description: Channel the redemption was made via, e.g. 'web', 'mobile', 'whatsapp', 'api', 'pos'

total.description: Total matching redemptions across all pages

fulfillmentNotes.example: Customer received free bottle water at store

suspendedPoints.description: Points suspended (merchant on an unpaid plan)

totalEarnedAllTime.description: Lifetime points earned for this merchant

totalRedeemedAllTime.description: Lifetime points redeemed for this merchant

pointsChanged.description: Points changed (positive for awards, negative for redemptions/revokes)

balanceBefore.description: Active point balance before this transaction

balanceAfter.description: Active point balance after this transaction

actionType.description: Action type that triggered this transaction

redemptionDetails.description: What the points were redeemed for, if this was a redemption-linked transaction

saleId.description: Originating sale ID, if awarded from a purchase

rewardName.description: Snapshot of the reward name at time of redemption

balance.description: Null if the customer has no LoyaltyPoint/MerchantPointBalance record yet for this merchant/store

recentTransactions.description: Most recent 20 loyalty transactions, newest first

secret.description: HMAC signing secret — only shown once at creation

events.description: Event types to subscribe to. Use ["*"] for all events.

requiresSecret.description: Whether setup still requires providing a provider secret (false once configured)

secretConfigured.description: Whether the provider secret has been configured (Step 2 of setup)

sourceType.description: Source type: "pos" for POS terminal payments, "bank_transfer" for virtual account / bank transfer notifications

signatureScheme.description: Override the default signature scheme for this provider

signatureHeader.description: Override the default signature header for this provider

sourceType.description: Updated source type: "pos" for POS terminal, "bank_transfer" for bank account

processingError.example: Mapping not found for event type

code.description: Coupon code (3–50 alphanumeric/hyphen chars). Stored uppercase.

value.description: Percentage (1–100) for PERCENTAGE type, fixed amount (>0) for FIXED_AMOUNT/FREE_SHIPPING. For BUY_X_GET_Y, use buyXGetYConfig.discountPercentage instead.

minimumPurchase.description: Minimum cart subtotal required to apply coupon

maximumDiscount.description: Maximum discount amount (cap) — only meaningful for PERCENTAGE type

currency.description: Currency code for FIXED_AMOUNT (e.g. USD, NGN)

startDate.description: When the coupon becomes active — defaults to now if omitted

endDate.description: When the coupon expires — omit for a coupon that never expires

firstTimeOnly.description: Restrict to customer's first purchase with this org

stackable.description: Whether this coupon stacks with others

applicableStores.description: Restrict to specific stores (empty = all stores in org)

applicableProducts.description: Restrict to specific products (empty = all products in org)

applicableCategories.description: Restrict to specific categories (empty = all categories)

excludedProducts.description: Products explicitly excluded from the discount

isPublic.description: When true, this coupon is visible in the public storefront coupon listing. Private coupons (default) are only redeemable when the customer already knows the code.

value.description: Percentage (1–100) for PERCENTAGE type, fixed amount (>0) for FIXED_AMOUNT/FREE_SHIPPING. For BUY_X_GET_Y, use buyXGetYConfig.discountPercentage instead.

minimumPurchase.description: Minimum cart subtotal required to apply coupon

maximumDiscount.description: Maximum discount amount (cap) — only meaningful for PERCENTAGE type

currency.description: Currency code for FIXED_AMOUNT (e.g. USD, NGN)

startDate.description: When the coupon becomes active — defaults to now if omitted

endDate.description: When the coupon expires — omit for a coupon that never expires

firstTimeOnly.description: Restrict to customer's first purchase with this org

stackable.description: Whether this coupon stacks with others

applicableStores.description: Restrict to specific stores (empty = all stores in org)

applicableProducts.description: Restrict to specific products (empty = all products in org)

applicableCategories.description: Restrict to specific categories (empty = all categories)

excludedProducts.description: Products explicitly excluded from the discount

isPublic.description: When true, this coupon is visible in the public storefront coupon listing. Private coupons (default) are only redeemable when the customer already knows the code.

storeId.description: Store this program is tied to

commissionValue.description: Percentage (0.01–100) for PERCENTAGE type, fixed amount (>0) for FIXED_AMOUNT

commissionCurrencyId.description: Currency for the commission value. Defaults to the user's preferred currency, or USD if not set.

productIds.description: Product IDs to include (required when scopeType = SPECIFIC_PRODUCTS)

allowSelfReferral.description: Allow affiliate to earn on own purchases

commissionValue.description: Percentage (0.01–100) for PERCENTAGE type, fixed amount (>0) for FIXED_AMOUNT

productIds.description: Product IDs to include (required when scopeType = SPECIFIC_PRODUCTS)

allowSelfReferral.description: Allow affiliate to earn on own purchases

action.description: Lifecycle action to apply to the affiliate program
Lifecycle action to apply to the affiliate membership

reason.description: Reason for suspension (only used when action is "suspend")

username.description: Username of an existing ChatterWallet user (provide username OR email)

email.description: Email address to invite (provide email OR username)

name.description: Concatenation of firstName + lastName; empty string if the user record is missing

affiliateName.description: Concatenation of firstName + lastName; empty string if the user record is missing

qualifyingAmount.description: Converted to the resolved display currency

commissionAmount.description: Converted to the resolved display currency
